name: Reuben Cassorole a La Orcas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 2-quart baking dish.
3. Cook noodles according to package directions.
4. Toss the cooked noodles with butter.
5. Layer the noodles, sauerkraut, corned beef, and tomatoes in the prepared baking dish.
6. Dot with salad dressing and sprinkle with cheese.
7. Top with crushed cracker crumbs and caraway seed.
8. Bake, covered, for 40 minutes.
9. Uncover and bake for an additional 15 minutes, or until bubbly.
Nutritional info per serving: 417 cal; 22g fat (48%); 30 carb
